examples: They would confidently intuit your very thoughts.
Somehow they were often able to intuit the names’ birdiness or fishiness
Whether employers will intuit the value of a master’s in Jewish studies is unclear.
Meeker was among the first analysts to cover Dell, Microsoft, Intuit, AOL, Netscape, Yahoo!
Companies like Intuit (Nasdaq:INTU) and Paychex (PAYX) have made a fortune by selling to SMBs.
